films.description: A tender family portrait where everyday struggle meets cosmic ambition.

films.title: Monkey Business

films.description: Anne Hathaway and Michaela Coel star as a troubled pop star and her estranged former collaborator in this chic psychodrama from David Lowery.

films.cast: Cary Grant, Ginger Rogers, Marilyn Monroe, Charles Coburn
